stemHtml: On a scheduled flight, the ATC asks the pilots to change their route. What action is required for the IRS?

options.a: enter the new waypoints into the control unit of each IRS, ensuring the system in use is updated first.
options.b: the pilot will need to revert to manual navigation. The aircraft must be stationary to update waypoints in the IRS.
options.c: modern aircraft have GPS, so the pilot does not need to update waypoints in the IRS.
options.d: enter the new waypoints into the MCDU of the FMS.
